name: KNOWN_ORGS asymmetric pass-through
description: Both topics mention '삼성' so legacy entity gate union-merged them via the KNOWN_ORGS one-sided pass-through loophole, even though the events are unrelated (반도체 실적 vs 노조 파업). v8 k-NN must reject the merge because the embedding cosine between the two topic centroids is below 0.78.

posts.title: 삼성 노조 파업 돌입 — 임금협상 결렬
